Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-24T22:09:56Z","updated_at":"2024-09-24T22:09:56Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

Error while running the nupmy test suite when everything is compiled with -march znver3 -mtune znver3 (could also affect znver1..znver4)

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
nix build --impure --expr \
                                                   'let pkgs = import <nixpkgs> {
                                                      localSystem = {
                                                        gcc.arch = "znver3";
                                                        gcc.tune = "znver3";
                                                        system = "x86_64-linux";
                                                      };
                                                    };
                                                  in pkgs.mkShell {
                                                    packages = [(pkgs.python3.withPackages (ps: [ ps.numpy_1]))];
                                                  }'
```
```


### Error message:

```shell
__________________ TestAccuracy.test_validate_transcendentals __________________
[gw6] linux -- Python 3.12.6 /nix/store/x8kx10d7b15c002l66p0v0np9iqlggac-python3-3.12.6/bin/python3.12

self = <numpy.core.tests.test_umath_accuracy.TestAccuracy object at 0x7fffa7ca9c40>

    @platform_skip
    def test_validate_transcendentals(self):
        with np.errstate(all='ignore'):
            data_dir = path.join(path.dirname(__file__), 'data')
            files = os.listdir(data_dir)
            files = list(filter(lambda f: f.endswith('.csv'), files))
            for filename in files:
                filepath = path.join(data_dir, filename)
                with open(filepath) as fid:
                    file_without_comments = (r for r in fid if not r[0] in ('$', '#'))
                    data = np.genfromtxt(file_without_comments,
                                         dtype=('|S39','|S39','|S39',int),
                                         names=('type','input','output','ulperr'),
                                         delimiter=',',
                                         skip_header=1)
                    npname = path.splitext(filename)[0].split('-')[3]
                    npfunc = getattr(np, npname)
                    for datatype in np.unique(data['type']):
                        data_subset = data[data['type'] == datatype]
                        inval  = np.array(str_to_float(data_subset['input'].astype(str), data_subset['type'].astype(str)), dtype=eval(datatype))
                        outval = np.array(str_to_float(data_subset['output'].astype(str), data_subset['type'].astype(str)), dtype=eval(datatype))
                        perm = np.random.permutation(len(inval))
                        inval = inval[perm]
                        outval = outval[perm]
                        maxulperr = data_subset['ulperr'].max()
>                       assert_array_max_ulp(npfunc(inval), outval, maxulperr)
E                       AssertionError: Arrays are not almost equal up to 2 ULP (max difference is 3 ULP)

lib/python3.12/site-packages/numpy/core/tests/test_umath_accuracy.py:66: AssertionError
```
```


### Python and NumPy Versions:

[nix-shell:/etc/nixos]$ python --version --version
Python 3.12.6 (main, Sep  6 2024, 19:03:47) [GCC 14.2.0]

```

3.12.6 (main, Sep  6 2024, 19:03:47) [GCC 14.2.0]
```

```shell
nix build --impure --expr \
  'let pkgs = import <nixpkgs> {
    localSystem = {
      gcc.arch = "znver3";
      gcc.tune = "znver3";
      system = "x86_64-linux";
    };
  };
  in pkgs.mkShell {
    packages = [(pkgs.python3.withPackages (ps: [ ps.numpy_1]))];
